since_last: 65% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +4.90%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.09% · BTC +2.50% · Gold +1.51% · Nasdaq100 -1.14%. 65% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +4.90%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +4.90%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.79%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LRCX is the standout at -11.00%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.69%, APP +10.10%, META +9.58%, PLTR +8.81%, PATH +8.46%. Laggards: LRCX -11.00%, KLAC -10.69%, AMAT -10.67%, TER -10.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.96% at $162.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
